title: BHU – Research Associate, Project Assistant, Sanskrit Consultant – 3 Posts

basic_details.job_title: BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Research Associate, Project Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Research Associate, Project Assistant, Sanskrit Consultant. Candidates with Ph.D, Postgraduate Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 2026-05-25. The candidate shall apply offline through BHU official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Ancient Indian History, Culture & Archaeology / Sanskrit / Ancient History / Indology or allied subject, Postgraduate in relevant subject with UGC-NET/JRF and research experience in Purāṇic studies, Postgraduate in Ancient Indian History, Culture & Archaeology / Sanskrit / Ancient History / Archaeology / Indology with minimum 55% marks, Acharya/M.A. in Sanskrit with proficiency in Purāṇic Sanskrit texts, translation and manuscript reading

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
